channel.title: OCM Controllers on Open Component Model
channel.description: Recent content in OCM Controllers on Open Component Model
channel.copyright: © Copyright 2025, SAP SE and Open Component Model Contributors

item.title: Architecture
item.description: This document explains the architecture of the OCM Kubernetes Controller Set (KCS). The purpose of the KCS is to enable the automated deployment of components using Kubernetes and Flux.

item.title: Installation
item.description:
ocm-controller

The ocm-controller can be installed using the OCM CLI:

This command will install the ocm-controller in the kubernetes cluster specified by the current KUBECONFIG context.
